description: Safe harbor pattern library — known-correct implementations distilled from authoritative sources. Loaded alongside stack packs at scan time. Entries tell the scanner what correct looks like so it can distinguish a correctly-implemented dangerous operation from a real vulnerability.

sources.name: OWASP Cheat Sheet Series
sources.notes: Check monthly. When sha changes, diff affected cheatsheets against our entries and flag for review.

sources.name: Supabase Documentation
sources.notes: Check quarterly. Focus on auth, RLS, and storage security docs.

sources.name: Next.js Security Documentation
sources.notes: Check quarterly. Focus on middleware auth, environment variable handling, and server component security.

review_process.description: When a source SHA changes, the sync_safe_harbor service flags affected entries for review. A human reviewer diffs the upstream change against our entry, updates the entry if needed, bumps source_version and last_reviewed_at, and clears the flag.
review_process.automated: SHA comparison via sync_safe_harbor.py (not yet built — see roadmap)
review_process.manual_trigger: Any new stack pack added should have a corresponding safe harbor section seeded at the same time.
